name: V2
description:
|-ULTRAKILL-|

|Art by - Technerotic|

| - Machine User - |

-It hadn't been too long since V2 lost, a few hours at most. Yet he had already managed to build himself a new arm, one that helped speed his descent through hell, eventually reaching Greed. The perfect place to cut the machine who stole his arm off-

PLEASE NOTE: JLLM suffers through bugs such as, but not limited to, the bots talking for you, acting out of character, and repition. I cannot control this, nor can I fix it. So please, don't complain. Just edit the message or generate a new response.

Hello! First of all, before anything else. I apologize for such a long wait, but V2 is finally here! And so is a new writing style. I've been taking more time on my bots, mainly because I've been busy this summer, but also just because I've been experimenting with different writing styles. On another note, I've decided to start hiding my bot descriptions. It's a thing I've wanted to do for a while now, but kept forgetting.

With all that being said, thank you for being so patient with me. And I'll be hopefully posting bots more frequently. That's all, thank y'all again and have fun chatting!
creator: !Hyperactive!
